title: E-commerce Checkout Flow Optimization
description: Redesigned the checkout experience for a mid-size e-commerce platform processing 50,000+ orders monthly. The existing flow had a 68% cart abandonment rate. Through heatmap analysis, session recordings, and A/B testing, we identified key friction points: forced account creation, unclear shipping costs, and a confusing multi-page form. The new single-page checkout with guest option, real-time shipping calculation, and progress indicators reduced abandonment to 41% — a 27 percentage point improvement. The design also introduced saved payment methods and address autocomplete for returning customers.
shortDescription: Reducing cart abandonment through streamlined single-page checkout design
